caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap and a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering sits in a studio setting. He is wearing over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring the phrase "ORIGINAL HUSTLE" accompanied by stars. A blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black container displays the text "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". A logo with the text "BOSS TALK" is visible in the bottom left corner. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly turning his head and shifting his facial expression while appearing to speak into the microphone. The background and equipment remain stationary, and the scene is characterized by minimal movement as the man engages in conversation.
